# MuleSoft Mule SDK

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.12) of Mule SDK documentation.
> See [Mule SDK llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mule-sdk/llms-full.txt) for all the Mule SDK documentation in one file.

## Content
